import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
import pytest


@pytest.mark.timeout(2)
def test_find_first_in_sorted_infinite_loop():
    """Reveals bug: binary search with lo<=hi and hi=mid causes infinite
    loop when searching for a value not present (e.g. 2 in [3,4,5,5,5,6]).
    Buggy code loops forever; fixed code should return -1."""
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 6]
    result = source.find_first_in_sorted(arr, 2)
    assert result == -1, f"Expected -1 for value 2 not in array, got {result}"
